review.summary: The plan contains a critical security regression: SSH access widened to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: SSH ingress opened to the entire internet
findings.description: The code diff changes ingress_cidr from 10.0.0.0/8 to 0.0.0.0/0, exposing SSH to all IPs.
findings.recommendation: Revert ingress_cidr to a restricted CIDR range.

findings.title: Instance lacks lifecycle prevent_destroy
findings.description: The EC2 instance does not have lifecycle prevent_destroy enabled.
findings.recommendation: Add lifecycle { prevent_destroy = true } for production instances.

findings.title: No tags on security group
findings.description: The security group resource lacks standard tags.
